Interface IFeatureClassContainer

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that return feature classes by name, ID and index.

[Guid("3B439634-CFC3-11D1-AEAD-0000F80372B4")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IFeatureClassContainer

Properties

Class[int]

The FeatureClass associated with the specified index value.

IFeatureClass Class[int ClassIndex] { get; }

Parameters

ClassIndex int

Property Value

IFeatureClass

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClassByID[int]

The FeatureClass with the specified ID.

IFeatureClass ClassByID[int ID] { get; }

Parameters

ID int

Property Value

IFeatureClass

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClassByName[string]

The FeatureClass with the specified name.

IFeatureClass ClassByName[string Name] { get; }

Parameters

Name string

Property Value

IFeatureClass

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClassCount

The number of FeatureClasses in this container.

int ClassCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Classes

An enumerator over the FeatureClasses.

IEnumFeatureClass Classes { get; }

Property Value

IEnumFeatureClass
